# VerdictLens

version: 2
site: http://localhost:3000/
name: VerdictLens
description: Discovery, shortlist, compare, and compatibility guide for AI models and skills with official-source signals and structured public data.
last_updated: 2026-04-10T01:45:00.000Z
languages: en, zh-TW
formats: text/html, application/json

[product_direction]
- verdictlens is not a generic marketplace clone
- primary flow is discovery -> shortlist -> compare -> routing/compatibility
- skills are modeled as a normalized registry/index layer
- public JSON is shaped for future APIs, team features, registration, saved lists, and routing logic

[entity_types]
- provider | official_url, docs_url, logo, source_refs, last_verified_at
- model | provider, official_url, docs_url, pricing_url, best_for, works_with, source_refs, last_verified_at, scores, pricing, modalities
- skill | category, skill_type, preferred_source_url, install_method, deployment, supported_hosts, supported_providers, capabilities, permission_profile, works_with, source_refs, last_verified_at
- use_case | title, summary, evaluation_lens, recommended_models, recommended_skills, source_refs, last_verified_at

[important_paths]
- landing | http://localhost:3000/
- models_index_en | http://localhost:3000/en/models
- skills_index_en | http://localhost:3000/en/skills
- compare_en | http://localhost:3000/en/compare
- models_json | http://localhost:3000/data/models.json
- skills_json | http://localhost:3000/data/skills.json
- providers_json | http://localhost:3000/data/providers.json
- catalog_json | http://localhost:3000/data/catalog.json

[entities.models]
- gpt-5 | GPT-5 | provider=openai | best_for=coding,agent-automation | works_with=Codex CLI,OpenAI Responses API,LangGraph,E2B | official=https://openai.com/
- gpt-5-mini | GPT-5 mini | provider=openai | best_for=coding,agent-automation | works_with=Codex CLI,OpenAI Responses API,LangChain,Browserbase | official=https://openai.com/

- gpt-realtime-mini | gpt-realtime-mini | provider=openai | best_for=agent-automation | works_with=Voice agents,WebRTC apps,Telephony | official=https://openai.com/
- gpt-image-1-mini | gpt-image-1-mini | provider=openai | best_for=research | works_with=Creative tooling,Marketing pipelines,Image editing flows | official=https://openai.com/

- gemini-2-5-flash | Gemini 2.5 Flash | provider=google | best_for=agent-automation,research | works_with=Gemini API,Vertex AI,grounded search flows | official=https://ai.google.dev/
- deepseek-chat-v3-2 | deepseek-chat (DeepSeek-V3.2) | provider=deepseek | best_for=coding,agent-automation | works_with=DeepSeek API,routing layers,budget coding flows | official=https://www.deepseek.com/
- deepseek-reasoner-v3-2 | deepseek-reasoner (DeepSeek-V3.2) | provider=deepseek | best_for=coding,research | works_with=DeepSeek API,longer reasoning flows,budget research stacks | official=https://www.deepseek.com/
- command-a | Command A | provider=cohere | best_for=agent-automation,research | works_with=Cohere API,RAG pipelines,enterprise search | official=https://cohere.com/
- command-a-reasoning | Command A Reasoning | provider=cohere | best_for=agent-automation,research | works_with=Cohere API,enterprise agents,tool-use workflows | official=https://cohere.com/
- command-r7b | Command R7B | provider=cohere | best_for=agent-automation | works_with=Cohere API,classification,budget enterprise assistants | official=https://cohere.com/
- sonar | Sonar | provider=perplexity | best_for=research | works_with=Search-backed answers,news monitoring,web-grounded assistants | official=https://www.perplexity.ai/
- sonar-pro | Sonar Pro | provider=perplexity | best_for=research | works_with=research copilots,search-grounded Q&A,news workflows | official=https://www.perplexity.ai/
- sonar-reasoning-pro | Sonar Reasoning Pro | provider=perplexity | best_for=research | works_with=deeper search workflows,analysis assistants,research copilots | official=https://www.perplexity.ai/
- sonar-deep-research | Sonar Deep Research | provider=perplexity | best_for=research | works_with=deep research workflows,citation-heavy reports,analyst assistants | official=https://www.perplexity.ai/
- mistral-large-3 | Mistral Large 3 | provider=mistral | best_for=coding,research | works_with=Mistral API,self-hosted evaluation,document workflows | official=https://mistral.ai/
- mistral-medium-3 | Mistral Medium 3 | provider=mistral | best_for=coding,agent-automation | works_with=Mistral API,agent toolchains,document Q&A | official=https://mistral.ai/
- mistral-small-3-2 | Mistral Small 3.2 | provider=mistral | best_for=agent-automation | works_with=Mistral API,classification,routing layers | official=https://mistral.ai/

[entities.skills]
- codex-cli | Codex CLI | type=coding | install=npm | deployment=local | providers=openai | preferred_source=https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli/
- claude-code | Claude Code | type=coding | install=npm | deployment=local | providers=anthropic | preferred_source=https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/overview
- langgraph | LangGraph | type=workflow | install=pip | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,deepseek,mistral,cohere,perplexity,local | preferred_source=https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/
- langchain | LangChain | type=workflow | install=pip | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,deepseek,mistral,cohere,perplexity,local | preferred_source=https://docs.langchain.com/
- openai-agents-sdk | OpenAI Agents SDK | type=api | install=pip | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai | preferred_source=https://openai.github.io/openai-agents-python/
- n8n | n8n | type=workflow | install=manual | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,deepseek,mistral,cohere,perplexity,any | preferred_source=https://docs.n8n.io/
- pipedream | Pipedream | type=workflow | install=hosted | deployment=hosted | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://pipedream.com/docs/
- playwright | Playwright | type=browser | install=npm | deployment=hybrid | providers=any | preferred_source=https://playwright.dev/docs/intro
- browserbase | Browserbase | type=browser | install=npm | deployment=hosted | providers=any | preferred_source=https://docs.browserbase.com/
- firecrawl | Firecrawl | type=extraction | install=npm | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://docs.firecrawl.dev/
- tavily | Tavily | type=search | install=api | deployment=hosted | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://docs.tavily.com/
- exa | Exa | type=search | install=api | deployment=hosted | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://docs.exa.ai/

- openai-whisper | OpenAI Whisper | type=extraction | install=pip | deployment=local | providers=local | preferred_source=https://github.com/openai/whisper
- 1password-cli | 1Password CLI | type=security | install=manual | deployment=local | providers=any | preferred_source=https://developer.1password.com/docs/cli/
- weaviate | Weaviate | type=memory | install=manual | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,local,any | preferred_source=https://docs.weaviate.io/
- mem0 | Mem0 | type=memory | install=pip | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://docs.mem0.ai/
- github-mcp-server | GitHub MCP Server | type=mcp | install=npm | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,any | preferred_source=https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server
- supabase-mcp-server | Supabase MCP Server | type=mcp | install=manual | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,any | preferred_source=https://supabase.com/docs/guides/getting-started/mcp

- notion-mcp-server | Notion MCP | type=mcp | install=manual | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://developers.notion.com/docs/mcp

- docker-mcp-gateway | Docker MCP Gateway | type=connector | install=manual | deployment=local | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://docs.docker.com/guides/lab-mcp-gateway/
- tavily-mcp | Tavily MCP | type=search | install=npm | deployment=local | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://docs.tavily.com/documentation/mcp
- grafana-mcp | Grafana MCP | type=mcp | install=pip | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://github.com/grafana/mcp-grafana
- xcodebuildmcp | XcodeBuildMCP | type=coding | install=npm | deployment=local | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://github.com/getsentry/XcodeBuildMCP

- elevenlabs-mcp | ElevenLabs MCP | type=extraction | install=pip | deployment=local | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://github.com/elevenlabs/elevenlabs-mcp
- vercel-skills | Vercel Skills | type=coding | install=npm | deployment=local | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://vercel.com/docs/agent-resources/skills
- discord-mcp | Discord MCP | type=mcp | install=manual | deployment=local | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://github.com/SaseQ/discord-mcp
- x-research-skill | X Research Skill | type=search | install=github | deployment=local | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://github.com/rohunvora/x-research-skill

[crawl_hints]
- Prefer localized HTML pages for human-readable summaries and editorial context.
- Prefer JSON endpoints for structured ingestion, shortlist generation, and compatibility analysis.
- Scores are editorial guidance, not vendor benchmark claims.
